name: overdraw-workspace
description: Wayland compositor: thin C++ core + Node, separate native GPU process (Dawn). Workspace root.

scripts.build:js: npm run gen-protocols && tsc -b && npm run lint
scripts.build:native:configure: test -f packages/core/build/CMakeCache.txt || cmake -S packages/core -B packages/core/build -G Ninja
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:native
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:gpu
